title: Is there a way to have empty dates populate on the xaxis?i
excerpt: Is there a way to have empty dates populate on the xaxis?i

posts.author: Gopmbkb (Pardip kumae)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to have empty dates populate on the xaxis?i

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! Are you looking to have items with no date appear on the chart widget? If so, this can be found in the settings of the widget!

Screenshot 2024-07-12 at 2.35.17 PM1575×748 50.2 KB

Hope this helps! Definitely let me know though if you were trying to accomplish something else.
